case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS FANAIKA, ASINATE et al

docket_entries.description: RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT ON CASE 722931 FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO AS TO DEFENDANT FANAIKA, ASINATE FANAIKA, PITA

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FANAIKA, ASINATE FANAIKA, PITA $2,085.04 PRINCIPAL, $1,995.85 INTEREST, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,080.89, RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT ON CASE NO. 722931. JUDGMENT ENTERED ON NOV. 18, 1992. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
